channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Former SAPS marksman arrested for murder of Witness D
item.description: Police have apprehended Matipandile Sotheni, a former elite SAPS officer, who is accused of murdering Marius van der Merwe, known as Witness D at the Madlanga Commission. Authorities describe Sotheni ...

item.title: GOP Divided on Trump’s 2020 Election Focus Ahead of Midterms
item.description: As the 2026 midterm elections approach, a growing number of Republican strategists and state party leaders are urging former President Donald Trump to shift his focus away from revisiting the 2020 ele...

item.title: How to Set SBS News as Your Preferred Source on Google in Australia
item.description: Google has rolled out a feature in Australia allowing users to select preferred news sources, giving greater visibility to chosen outlets in Top Stories. SBS News, recognised as one of Australia's mos...

item.title: Getrude Lamu’s Leadership Journey and Promotion of Women in TEAGTL
item.description: Getrude Lamu, Head of Administration at Tanzania East Africa Gateway Terminal Limited (TEAGTL), is a clear example of how women leadership can inspire growth not just for oneself but also for others. ...

item.title: Justice Lenaola calls for ethical legal training and inclusion of former judges in law schools
item.description: Supreme Court Judge Isaac Lenaola has emphasised the need for strong ethical standards in Kenya's legal profession. Speaking at the launch of Zetech University's Law School and LL.B programme at the M...

item.title: Why Global Climate Finance Systems Dey Fail Africa and Wetin We Fit Do to Amend Am
item.description: Climate change no be future thing for Africa again; e don turn current wahala. Floods dey destroy infrastructure wey take years to build, drought dey spoil harvests and scatter people, extreme heat de...

item.title: Two men killed in separate ambushes in Cotabato’s BARMM towns
item.description: Two separate ambush attacks in neighboring towns under the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM), located in Cotabato province, resulted in the deaths of two Moro men and left anothe...

item.title: London Club Owner Plans Exclusive Florida Venue Inspired by Mar-a-Lago
item.description: Robin Birley, a prominent London club owner whose venues have attracted figures such as Prince William, Leonardo DiCaprio, and Hugh Grant, is reportedly finalising plans for a private members’ club in...

item.title: Netflix Films ‘Frankenstein’ and ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ Take Multiple Oscars
item.description: At the 2026 Academy Awards, Netflix saw significant recognition with two of its films winning multiple Oscars. Guillermo del Toro’s reimagined 'Frankenstein' secured awards for Best Production Design,...

item.title: USOSA and Wowbii Promote Early Technology Education to Strengthen Nigerian Schools
item.description: For Nigeria to waka well for future, Michael Magaji, President General of Unity Schools Old Students Association (USOSA), and Gbolahan Ilayomi, Founder and CEO of Wowbii Interactive Technology, don ta...

item.title: Melissa Auf der Maur Reflects on Life in Hole, Smashing Pumpkins, and the 90s Music Scene
item.description: Melissa Auf der Maur, bassist for Hole and later the Smashing Pumpkins, has released her memoir, 'Even the Good Girls Will Cry', offering an unflinching look at her experiences as a woman in the tumul...

item.title: CBI challenges Delhi HC order discharging Kejriwal and 22 others in liquor policy case
item.description: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has approached the Delhi High Court urging that the order discharging all 23 accused, including Aam Aadmi Party chief Arvind Kejriwal, in the liquor policy ca...

item.title: Maritime Gas Prices Rise Over the Weekend
item.description: Over the past weekend, gas prices in the Maritime provinces saw a notable increase, affecting drivers across Nova Scotia, New Brunswick, and Prince Edward Island. Consumers have been closely monitorin...

item.title: PDP Chieftain Explains Why Wike Opposes Supreme Court Appeal in Ongoing Leadership Crisis
item.description: One big chieftain for People’s Democratic Party (PDP), Umar Sani, don yarn for Symfoni TV about the wahala wey dey inside the party now. Him talk say FCT Minister Nyesom Wike no dey support say dem ca...

item.title: Timothée Chalamet’s Oscar campaign for Marty Supreme falls short despite widespread promotion
item.description: Timothée Chalamet’s extensive and highly visible campaign for his film Marty Supreme failed to secure any nominations at the 2026 Academy Awards, despite early success and a Golden Globe win. His prom...

item.title: Elele Alimini Monarch Appeals for Government Support as NGO Trains Leaders on Peace and Development
item.description: The Paramount Ruler of Elele Alimini, HRH Eze CP Peter Wagbara (rtd), don appeal to Rivers State Government to give support to him community, because dem dey lack basic things like healthcare and deve...

item.title: 2026 NCAA Women's Basketball Tournament Seeds and Matchups Announced
item.description: The NCAA Women's Basketball Tournament field for 2026 has been officially announced. The UConn Huskies earned the No. 1 overall seed as they pursue their 13th national championship, remaining the only...

item.title: Kaduna-Abuja Train Collision Causes Service Suspension and Passenger Stranding
item.description: On Monday morning, March 16, 2026, hundreds of passengers on the Abuja-bound train from Kaduna experienced a serious incident when their train collided with another train along the rail corridor. The ...

item.title: RB Leipzig embraces South African culture with ‘Re Kaofela’ tour
item.description: RB Leipzig, the German Bundesliga outfit, is set to visit South Africa from May 26 to 30, where they will face Mamelodi Sundowns at Lucas Moripe Stadium on May 29. The club has named this visit the ‘R...

item.title: Pakistan’s Current Petroleum Reserves and Price Hikes Amid Middle East Supply Issues
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Pakistan currently has petrol reserves sufficient for 27 days and diesel for 21 days, Petroleum Secretary Hamed Yaqoob Sheikh informed the Senate Standing Committee on Petroleum. Jet fuel (...
